acceptance: every scorer is bound to a server-authoritative signed identity assertion
MFA is required and exact reviewer role is verified
every annotation payload is separately reviewer-authenticated for the exact main and scoring run
fabricated scorer identity, role, key id, signature, annotation approval or expired assertion fails closed
every annotation evidence file is reproduced from immutable original and independently restored roots
Selectel S3 object identity, VersionId, size, digest, Object Lock retention and immutability are authenticated by a separately trusted provider inventory receipt
manifest scored_at equals the latest authenticated annotation timestamp and retention is measured from that completion
raw reviewer notes, evidence and signing keys remain outside Git and GitHub artifacts
benchmark and admission remain pending and production remains not attested
exact-head and exact-main gates pass before acceptance
forbidden_capabilities: raw reviewer notes, evidence or signing keys in Git
model admission, routing activation, deployment or production attestation
trust in submitter-declared scorer identity, role, annotation verdict or self-digest
trust in submitter-declared S3 VersionId, retention or immutability
trust in unreproduced external evidence digests
